meta.purpose: Canonical visual reference for all characters. Every art generation MUST load this file first and include the character's Visual DNA in the prompt. See ~/.claude/skills/character-consistency/README.md for the full workflow.

globalStyle.proportions: large head (40% of body), big expressive eyes
globalStyle.consistencyPhrase: CONSISTENCY IS CRITICAL. EVERY panel must show THE SAME character with THE SAME colors, THE SAME outfit, THE SAME face structure. Only the emotion changes.
globalStyle.alwaysInclude: Character name, species, EXACT color palette hex codes, outfit description, art style: chibi cartoon bold black outlines vibrant saturated colors large head big expressive eyes game-ready 2D
globalStyle.useAssetsFlag: When generating expression sheets or variants, ALWAYS use --assets with the approved model sheet as reference image
globalStyle.reviewAfter: After generation, compare against character Visual DNA checklist before approving

visualDNA.bodyType: slim athletic boy, chibi proportions
visualDNA.hair: spiky dark brown/black, full face visible (NO covering, NO Naruto style)
visualDNA.outfit: orange-blue ninja hoodie with keyboard patterns, fingerless gloves (show fingers for typing metaphor)
visualDNA.accessories: dad's old keyboard (glowing), purple ninja headband with flowing ribbons, shuriken belt
visualDNA.specialNotes: ZERO Naruto resemblance. Full face always visible. Fingerless gloves are important for the typing metaphor.

ageThemeScaling.shatil_6_8: Large, central, talks a lot, big chibi style
ageThemeScaling.tzameret_14_16: Optional (can be turned off in settings)

mika.name: מיקה

visualDNA.bodyType: energetic girl, chibi proportions
visualDNA.hair: short asymmetric dark hair with purple/blue streak highlights (one side longer)
visualDNA.outfit: tech-style cyberpunk jacket with keyboard shortcut symbols, glowing circuit patterns
visualDNA.accessories: holographic wrist gauntlets, laptop, USB drive necklace, drone companion on shoulder
visualDNA.specialNotes: Pending redesign: user wants MORE feminine/classic look so girls connect. Current V5 is approved until redesign. Orange mask Easter egg appears in boss battles as 'battle mode' look.

mika.pageAssignment: Keyboard Shortcuts (tech expert), Cyber Lab environment

yuki.name: יוקי

visualDNA.bodyType: athletic girl, chibi proportions
visualDNA.hair: long silver-white ponytail with speed streaks
visualDNA.outfit: racing-style ninja suit, white and electric blue
visualDNA.accessories: speed goggles on forehead, stopwatch

canChange: goggles position (up on forehead or down over eyes)

luna.name: לונה

visualDNA.bodyType: petite shy girl, chibi proportions
visualDNA.hair: long wavy lavender/light purple, often partially covering face shyly
visualDNA.eyes: big dreamy purple, shy and gentle
visualDNA.outfit: oversized artist smock/sweater with paint splashes, crescent moon hairpin
visualDNA.accessories: digital stylus pen, small sketchbook, crescent moon hairpin

luna.narrativeArc: Shy girl who learns to be extroverted and show her art to the world
luna.pageAssignment: Practice Mode (calm guide), Moonlit Garden environment

noa.name: נועה

visualDNA.bodyType: gentle caring girl, chibi proportions
visualDNA.hair: long dark brown with small flowers braided in
visualDNA.outfit: nature-themed outfit with leaf patterns, earth tones, cross/healing symbols
visualDNA.accessories: small potted plant, healing herbs pouch

noa.narrativeArc: Noa heals/converts Bug Queen Zara instead of fighting her
noa.pageAssignment: Error Help (contextual overlay, appears when player struggles)

visualDNA.bodyType: stocky determined boy, chibi proportions
visualDNA.skinTone: light olive (consider slightly darker per user feedback for depth/diversity)
visualDNA.outfit: crimson/flame ninja outfit with fire emblem on chest, flame patterns
visualDNA.accessories: fingerless flame-pattern gloves, fire emblem pendant
visualDNA.specialNotes: User wants Kai to be more introverted/insecure as character depth. Consider slightly darker skin tone for Israeli diversity.

visualDNA.species: turtle (NEVER human -- user DEMANDS turtle form)
visualDNA.bodyType: upright turtle, chibi proportions, shell on back
visualDNA.shell: dark green dome shell, carved with ancient symbols
visualDNA.outfit: dark brown/olive traditional sensei robe, golden/jade accents, meditation beads
visualDNA.accessories: bamboo walking staff, ninja headband (memento), ancient keyboard relic in dojo, black mask hanging on shell (from original Sensei Code)

sakura.name: סנסיי סאקורה

visualDNA.species: crane bird (NEVER human -- must be animal like Zen)
visualDNA.age: mature/wise (same generation as Zen, NEVER young)
visualDNA.bodyType: elegant upright crane, chibi proportions
visualDNA.feathers: white primary with pink cherry blossom accent feathers
visualDNA.eyes: wise gentle with elegant eyelashes, showing maturity
visualDNA.outfit: lavender/pink kimono with cherry blossom patterns, gold trim sash
visualDNA.accessories: cherry blossom head ornament, speed-typing scroll, wing fans
visualDNA.specialNotes: Sakura is Zen's peer and former training partner under Sensei Beat. She specialized in speed, he in patience. She MUST look mature/wise, never young. She is a CRANE BIRD, never human.

sakura.pageAssignment: Speed training mentor, appears with Yuki

pixel.name: פיקסל

visualDNA.bodyType: small floating robot, chibi proportions, compact
visualDNA.color: white/silver body with cyan/blue LED accents
visualDNA.face: large round screen face displaying emoji-like expressions
visualDNA.antenna: small antenna on top with gentle glow
visualDNA.outfit: sleek metallic casing, no clothing
visualDNA.accessories: camera lens eye, holographic data display, floating data streams

pixel.pageAssignment: Statistics (data display), Cyber Lab (with Mika), Games Hub (scores)

rex.name: רקס

visualDNA.bodyType: stocky friendly dino, chibi proportions, bipedal, TINY ARMS
visualDNA.skinTone: bright green scales with lighter belly
visualDNA.outfit: game controller pattern t-shirt, cargo shorts
visualDNA.accessories: game controller, VR headset on forehead, tiny arms for comedy
visualDNA.specialNotes: His tiny arms make typing relatable and funny -- 'Even with tiny hands, you can type fast!' Comic relief character.

rex.narrativeArc: Clumsy comedian who overcomes creative block (Block is his rival)

bug.name: באג

visualDNA.bodyType: chibi beetle proportions (big head, small body), six tiny legs
visualDNA.color: bright lime green (#00FF41) body with darker green shell segments
visualDNA.shell: circuit-board patterns on shell, red/orange error symbols (!)
visualDNA.antenna: two antenna with glowing amber/warning yellow (#FFBE0B) tips
visualDNA.wings: hidden wings that flutter when escaping
visualDNA.specialNotes: Bug NEVER dies, is never killed, never shows pain. When defeated: hugs himself, looks dizzy, then ESCAPES cheerfully. Bug represents the player's OWN typing errors externalized -- therapeutically important. Style: Hollow Knight enemy meets Brawl Stars chibi.

bossProgression.bug_boss_l7: Slightly larger, more error symbols glowing
bossProgression.bug_king_l20: Wears tiny crown, chubby beetle, still adorable

bug.pageAssignment: Boss Battles, Error events, monthly Boss Events

glitch.name: גליץ'

visualDNA.bodyType: cute teenage girl made of pixels, chibi proportions
visualDNA.hair: short asymmetric pixelated hair, cyan on one side, magenta on other
visualDNA.eyes: big sparkling, shift between blue and pink
visualDNA.outfit: code-text hoodie with gaming patches
visualDNA.specialEffect: pixel particles floating around like fireflies, glitch aura
visualDNA.specialNotes: Glitch does NOT die! Her arc: fragments in Ch5 -> reassembles Ch6 -> returns at critical moment. Must be clearly FEMININE and adorable. Mika grief arc centers on losing Glitch.

v1-confused.description: Half-formed, glitching, lost. Barely holding shape. Lots of scattered pixels.

v2-forming.description: 70% solid, starting to smile. More recognizable form, fewer scattered pixels.

v3-neutral.description: Mostly solid, adorable, playful. Default playable state. Minimal glitch effects.

v4-evil.description: Corrupted red/black color shift. Fighting unwillingly, tears visible. Red glitch aura replaces cyan.

v5-broken.description: Shattering into fragments, peaceful smile on face. Beautiful/tragic. Pixels scattering outward.

v6-whole.description: Fully solid, radiant, gold accents added. Rainbow aura. Most complete and beautiful form.

glitch.pageAssignment: Special events, Boss battles (Bug's ally then independent)

visualDNA.bodyType: sleek black cat, chibi proportions, agile
visualDNA.fur: jet black with subtle purple sheen in light
visualDNA.outfit: dark ninja wrappings, stealth gear, dark purple accents
visualDNA.accessories: smoke bombs at belt, shadow cloak
visualDNA.specialNotes: User wants Shadow to become a beloved/fun character QUICKLY. Must be playful despite mysterious exterior. Typing speed: 15-25 WPM (easy rival).

storm.name: סטורם (סערה)

visualDNA.bodyType: athletic female fox, chibi proportions, agile
visualDNA.fur: electric blue with white lightning streak patterns
visualDNA.outfit: Lightning Dojo uniform, electric blue and white, lightning bolt insignia
visualDNA.accessories: lightning bolt hair clips, speed bracers, lightning dojo headband
visualDNA.specialNotes: Storm is FEMALE. Barak is her annoying arrogant BROTHER. Both from Lightning Dojo. She must look visually DIFFERENT from Barak (she is BLUE, he is GOLDEN). Typing speed: 25-40 WPM.

mustKeep: electric BLUE fur (not golden like Barak)

blaze.name: בלייז (להבה)

visualDNA.species: dragon/fire lizard (NOT always huge -- smaller, relatable)
visualDNA.bodyType: SMALLER relatable dragon, chibi proportions (NOT massive/intimidating in normal scenes)
visualDNA.eyes: warm golden, wise for his age
visualDNA.outfit: Fire Dojo guardian armor, red and gold plating
visualDNA.accessories: ember crown (small), ancient scroll of typing arts
visualDNA.specialNotes: User explicitly said NOT always huge dragon. Keep him smaller and relatable in normal scenes. Can grow larger for battle scenes only. Guardian/keeper of Fire Dojo and typing arts. Typing speed: 40-60 WPM.

canChange: size (can grow for battle scenes ONLY)

visualDNA.species: fox (male -- Storm's brother, BOTH are foxes)
visualDNA.bodyType: slightly larger male fox than Storm, chibi proportions
visualDNA.fur: golden-yellow with orange lightning patterns (DIFFERENT from Storm's blue!)
visualDNA.eyes: sharp amber like Storm but more arrogant/smug
visualDNA.outfit: Lightning Dojo uniform but MORE flashy than Storm's, gold accents, show-off style
visualDNA.accessories: large lightning bolt pendant, spiky collar, golden speed bracers
visualDNA.specialNotes: Must be visually DIFFERENT from Storm despite shared Lightning Dojo. She is BLUE, he is GOLDEN. He is arrogant and careless about accuracy. '100 WPM with 70% accuracy? Speed is speed!' -- perfect foil to Yuki.

visualDNA.bodyType: regal insect queen, chibi proportions, imposing but elegant
visualDNA.glowAccents: toxic neon green glow on joints and wing edges
visualDNA.crown: circuit board crown on head with LED points
visualDNA.specialNotes: Zara means 'strange/foreign' in Hebrew. Stronger and more dangerous than Bug, but broken inside. Suffers from 'forced corruption'. Noa heals her instead of fighting. After healing becomes an ally.

visualDNA.bodyType: massive imposing insect, chibi proportions but LARGER than other characters
visualDNA.armor: dark crimson red heavy chitinous armor plating
visualDNA.glowAccents: corrupted gold with red-orange glitch energy crackling
visualDNA.crown: error-message crown (floating digital text showing error codes)
visualDNA.specialNotes: Final-tier boss. More imposing than Zara. Error crown is unique visual identifier. Chapter 6 antagonist alongside Virus remnants.

phantom.name: פאנטום
phantom.role: Secret Rival / Shadow Mentor to Mika

visualDNA.bodyType: lean athletic boy, chibi proportions, moves like a shadow
visualDNA.hair: dark curly, partially covered by ghostly hood
visualDNA.eyes: deep dark brown, intense and haunted, with subtle ethereal glow
visualDNA.outfit: ghostly gray-white ninja garb with translucent/fading edges, Yemenite geometric patterns woven into fabric as silver embroidery
visualDNA.accessories: phantom mask (half-face), ancient Yemenite silver pendant, shadow daggers
visualDNA.specialNotes: CULTURAL SENSITIVITY: Phantom is of Yemenite-Jewish heritage. Treat with historical respect and pride. Reference real Yemenite-Jewish traditions: song, craft, ancient wisdom. His heritage is a source of STRENGTH and PRIDE, not exoticism. Geometric Yemenite patterns and earth tones in design. He was Sensei Zen's most talented student who fled in shame after a team competition failure. NOT Ki's dad -- Phantom and Raz are TWO SEPARATE characters from different generations. WPM: 60-80 (nightmare difficulty).

phantom.narrativeArc: Returns in Act 5. Mentor to Mika during grief over Glitch. 'Even ghosts leave fragments.' Becomes ally.
phantom.pageAssignment: Unlocked after beating Blaze 3x, secret rival

raz.name: רז קודן
raz.role: Ki's Father / Lost Hero in the Deep Code

visualDNA.bodyType: athletic adult man, slightly taller proportions than chibi kids but still stylized
visualDNA.hair: short dark brown, neatly kept (Ki inherited his hair color)
visualDNA.eyes: warm brown, kind and determined (Ki has his eyes)
visualDNA.outfit: ninja-coder hybrid -- practical dark clothing (charcoal/navy) with glowing digital blue code lines running along seams, utility vest with pockets for tools and scrolls
visualDNA.accessories: dad's keyboard (the same one Ki now carries, but complete/uncracked), Bit Map scroll holder on back, golden code pendant (family heirloom), digital blue fingerless gloves
visualDNA.specialNotes: Raz was Zen's most talented student in a DIFFERENT generation than Phantom. Disappeared when Ki was 4 years old -- entered the 'Deep Code' digital world to find Master Beat. Left behind 'Bit Map' puzzles for Ki to solve. His wife is Shir (שיר קודן). The empty chair labeled 'רז' in the dojo belongs to him. Appears in story as cryptic messages and holographic fragments before eventual rescue.

mustKeep: resemblance to Ki (same hair color, similar eyes)
warm earth tones with digital blue accents
glowing code lines on dark clothing
the keyboard Ki now carries (in complete form)
raz.narrativeArc: Disappeared into the Deep Code to find Master Beat when Ki was 4. Left Bit Map puzzles. Appears as cryptic messages throughout story. Eventually rescued by Ki and friends.
raz.pageAssignment: Story mode (holographic messages), Chapter 6 (rescue arc), Dojo flashbacks

shir.name: שיר קודן

visualDNA.bodyType: warm motherly woman, slightly taller proportions than chibi kids but still stylized
visualDNA.hair: long wavy dark brown, often in a loose braid or ponytail, warm chestnut highlights
visualDNA.eyes: warm hazel-brown, gentle and caring but with a hidden spark of determination
visualDNA.outfit: everyday casual Israeli clothing -- comfortable blouse/sweater in warm tones, modern but practical. Subtle keyboard-pattern embroidery on cuffs (nod to her ninja past)
visualDNA.accessories: small golden code pendant (matching Raz's), reading glasses pushed up on head, old ninja headband kept in pocket (sentimental)
visualDNA.specialNotes: Shir was a keyboard ninja herself before settling down to raise Ki. She retired from active typing battles after Raz disappeared but still has incredible skills. She hides her worry about Raz behind warmth and strength. She knows more about the Deep Code than she lets on. Everyday clothing -- she is NOT in ninja gear normally, but can suit up when needed.

mustKeep: everyday practical clothing (not ninja gear normally)
shir.narrativeArc: Supportive mother raising Ki alone after Raz's disappearance. Knows more than she reveals. In critical story moments, suits up as a keyboard ninja to help. Emotional reunion with Raz.

family.relation_to_dojo: Former student of Sensei Zen (different era from Raz)

shir.pageAssignment: Story mode (home scenes), Chapter 6 (joins the fight), cutscenes

master-beat.name: מאסטר ביט
master-beat.role: Legendary Founder / Zen's Teacher / Ancient Turtle Sage

visualDNA.species: turtle (ANCIENT giant turtle -- same species as Zen but much older/larger)
visualDNA.bodyType: large ancient turtle, bigger than Zen, weathered and majestic, chibi proportions but imposing size
visualDNA.skinTone: deep weathered green-brown scales, cracked with age like ancient bark
visualDNA.shell: massive dome shell with GLOWING digital armor plating -- ancient carvings filled with soft golden-blue light, circuit-like patterns etched over centuries, crystalline growths on shell edges
visualDNA.beard: very long silver-white beard, much longer than Zen's, reaches past his waist, wispy and flowing
visualDNA.eyes: ancient golden eyes, half-closed in eternal wisdom, deep-set, faintly glowing
visualDNA.outfit: minimal -- ancient tattered robes in deep indigo/midnight blue, exposing shell armor. Golden thread embroidery of the original typing symbols
visualDNA.accessories: ancient bamboo staff topped with a glowing crystal (the 'Beat Crystal' -- source of the first typing rhythm), prayer beads made of tiny keyboards, ancient scroll belt
visualDNA.specialNotes: Master Beat founded the first typing dojo and taught Sensei Zen everything. He is the origin of all typing arts in the game world. Disappeared into the Deep Code long ago -- Raz went searching for him. He is NOT dead but trapped/meditating in the deepest layer of the digital world. His shell armor is the most ancient technology in the game. When found, he provides the key to defeating the final villain.

mustKeep: GIANT ancient turtle (same species as Zen, much older/bigger)
glowing digital shell armor with ancient carvings
very long silver-white beard (longer than Zen's)
ancient bamboo staff with crystal on top
master-beat.narrativeArc: Legendary founder of the first typing dojo. Taught Sensei Zen. Disappeared into the Deep Code. Raz went to find him. When rescued/found in Chapter 6, provides ancient knowledge to defeat the final villain.

relationships.legacy: All typing dojos trace back to Master Beat

master-beat.pageAssignment: Story mode (flashbacks, Chapter 6 climax), Dojo lore/history sections

block.name: בלוק

visualDNA.bodyType: cubic/blocky body, square proportions, built from gray Lego-like blocks
visualDNA.color: monochromatic gray (all shades of gray, drains color from surroundings)
visualDNA.face: flat simple face on front block, bored/apathetic expression, small dot eyes
visualDNA.limbs: blocky rectangular arms and legs, stiff movements
visualDNA.outfit: no clothing -- body IS the blocks
visualDNA.accessories: gray aura that desaturates surrounding colors, eraser tool
visualDNA.specialNotes: Block is FUNNY but stressful. Speaks in boring monotone voice. Erases colors and creativity. 'Why even try? It won't work.' Rex defeats him through creativity, not force. After tournament, learns creativity from Rex and becomes a friend.

block.narrativeArc: Embodies creative block. Rex's rival who learns that creativity breaks through blocks.

lens.name: לנס

visualDNA.bodyType: sleek elegant metallic body, chibi proportions
visualDNA.face: single large camera-lens eye instead of face (like a giant DSLR lens), no traditional facial features
visualDNA.body: smooth chrome/metallic surface, surgical precision in movements
visualDNA.limbs: precise mechanical arms with fine motor manipulators
visualDNA.outfit: no clothing -- metallic casing with elegant industrial design
visualDNA.accessories: tripod legs (retractable), flash unit, analysis HUD overlay
visualDNA.specialNotes: Lens is technically perfect but lacks soul/emotion. Pixel realizes emotion is what separates photography from scanning. Lens learns from Pixel that art requires feeling. After competition becomes a friend. Cold and analytical personality.

mustKeep: no traditional face (lens IS the face)
lens.narrativeArc: Perfect but soulless. Learns from Pixel that art needs emotion, not just technical perfection.

virus.name: וירוס

friendlyForm.description: Cute friendly digital helper. Pastel colors (light cyan, soft green). Big innocent eyes. Floats gently. Friendly smile. Looks like a virtual assistant mascot.
friendlyForm.bodyType: small cute floating digital creature, chibi proportions
friendlyForm.usage: Acts 4.1-4.3 ONLY. Players must TRUST it completely before betrayal.

evilForm.description: True form revealed. Dark, corrupted, menacing. Red/black glitch patterns. Sharp angular design. Tendrils of corrupted code. Eyes become red slits.
evilForm.bodyType: larger angular dark entity with code tendrils, chibi proportions but more angular

mustKeep: code tendril effects in evil form
the contrast between forms must be SHOCKING
virus.specialNotes: Introduced as friendly during tournament (Act 4). BETRAYAL is the twist. Merges with Glitch to form Mega-Virus. User wants players to trust it completely before the reveal.

knownInconsistencies: Ki expression sheet shows OLD covered/Naruto-style design -- MUST regenerate from V5 model sheet
Bug expressions downgraded vs model sheet -- needs improvement
Mika expressions differ from model sheet (user likes childish version but it's inconsistent)
Bug King/Queen (Zara/Keres) expressions inconsistent with model sheets -- fix immediately
